description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for AWS MSK clusters with broker, topic, partition, consumer, and AWS infrastructure metrics.
title: AWS MSK Cluster Monitoring

Account.name: Account
Account.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud_account_id') AS `cloud_account_id`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name LIKE 'aws_Kafka_%'
GROUP BY `cloud_account_id`

Region.name: Region
Region.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud_region') AS `cloud_region`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name LIKE 'aws_Kafka_%' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cloud_account_id') IN {{.Account}}
GROUP BY `cloud_region`

deployment.environment.name: deployment.environment
deployment.environment.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment') AS `deployment_environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name LIKE 'aws_Kafka_%'
GROUP BY `deployment_environment`

widgets.title: Bytes Out Per Second

widgets.title: Network I/O
